messages.content: Call the GitHub tool to get the authenticated user, then reply with GH-USER:<login>. Then reply with HITL-DONE.

agent.agents_md: When asked for the GitHub user, call the GET_THE_AUTHENTICATED_USER tool, then reply with exactly 'GH-USER:' followed by the login value it returns. Do not guess. After the tool result, end with HITL-DONE.
